title: calendula suffruticosa subsp. lusitanica
intro: Calendula suffruticosa subsp. lusitanica, also known as Lusitanian dwarf marigold, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is a medicinal plant known for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in wound healing, skin care, and treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting tissue repair, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin issues, wounds, and digestive problems. Calendula suffruticosa subsp. lusitanica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, salves, creams, and ointments for topical application, as well as incorporated into skincare products and medicinal formulations.
